PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?leagueLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P54 ?crawlMembership .
  ?crawlMembership ps:P54 wd:Q19584 ; pq:P580 ?crawlStart ; pq:P582 ?crawlEnd .
  FILTER(?crawlEnd >= "2015-07-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime && ?crawlStart <= "2016-06-30T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  ?player wdt:P19 ?birthPlace .
  ?birthPlace wdt:P17 wd:Q967 .
  ?player p:P54 ?newMembership .
  ?newMembership ps:P54 ?newTeam ; pq:P580 ?newStart .
  FILTER(?newStart > ?crawlEnd)
  ?newTeam wdt:P118 ?league .
  ?league rdfs:label ?leagueLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?leagueLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY ?newStart
LIMIT 1
